title: Records: value equality и синтез компилятора

cards.prompt: record vs class equality: r1==r2 (record) и c1==c2 (class), одинаковые поля?
cards.code: using System; record Point(int X, int Y); class CPoint { public int X, Y; public CPoint(int x,int y){X=x;Y=y;} } var r1=new Point(1,2); var r2=new Point(1,2); var c1=new CPoint(1,2); var c2=new CPoint(1,2); Console.WriteLine($"{r1==r2} {c1==c2}");

cards.prompt: with nondestructive: p2 = p1 with { X=99 }; печать p1 и p2 (synthesized ToString)?
cards.code: using System; record Point(int X, int Y); var p1=new Point(1,2); var p2=p1 with { X=99 }; Console.WriteLine($"{p1} {p2}");
cards.expectedOutput: Point { X = 1, Y = 2 } Point { X = 99, Y = 2 }

cards.prompt: два разных record-типа A(1) и B(1): a.Equals(b)?
cards.code: using System; record A(int X); record B(int X); object a=new A(1); object b=new B(1); Console.WriteLine(a.Equals(b));
